recommendations.title: Bad Lieutenant
recommendations.overview: While investigating a young nun's rape, a corrupt New York City police detective, with a serious drug and gambling addiction, tries to change his ways and find forgiveness.

recommendations.title: Now, Voyager
recommendations.overview: A woman suffers a nervous breakdown and an oppressive mother before being freed by the love of a man she meets on a cruise.

recommendations.title: Django Unchained
recommendations.overview: With the help of a German bounty hunter, a freed slave sets out to rescue his wife from a brutal Mississippi plantation owner.

recommendations.title: The Basketball Diaries
recommendations.overview: A high school basketball player’s life turns upside down after free-falling into the harrowing world of drug addiction.

recommendations.title: 7 Prisoners
recommendations.overview: An impoverished teen seeking to escape the clutches of a human trafficker must weigh living up to his moral code against his struggle to survive.

recommendations.title: The Whale
recommendations.overview: A reclusive English teacher suffering from severe obesity attempts to reconnect with his estranged teenage daughter for one last chance at redemption.

recommendations.title: Thirteen Conversations About One Thing
recommendations.overview: In New York City, the lives of a lawyer, an actuary, a house-cleaner, a professor, and the people around them intersect as they ponder order and happiness in the face of life's cold unpredictability.

recommendations.title: The Visitor
recommendations.overview: A college professor travels to New York City to attend a conference and finds a young couple living in his apartment.

recommendations.title: A Thousand and One
recommendations.overview: Struggling but unapologetically living on her own terms, Inez is moving from shelter to shelter in mid-1990s New York City. With her 6-year-old son Terry in foster care and unable to leave him again, she kidnaps him so they can build their life toget

recommendations.title: Dead Man Down
recommendations.overview: In New York City, a crime lord's right-hand man is seduced by a woman seeking retribution.
